heading_path: Vitamin B12 deficiency in over 16s: diagnosis and management

headers: Results if testing total B12 concentrations
Results if testing active B12 concentrations
rows: Less than 180 nanograms (133 pmol) per litre
Between 180 and 350 nanograms (133 and 258 pmol) per litre
Indeterminate test result – possible vitamin B12 deficiency
More than 350 nanograms (258 pmol) per litre
Test result suggests vitamin B12 deficiency is unlikely
